title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is an AI design tool from Anthropic that automates design system creation and landing page generation. The tutorial demonstrates a 4-step workflow replacing traditional design software with AI-generated, branded, production-ready assets.
writeup: This AI Master tutorial covers Claude Design, an Anthropic tool that automates design system creation and landing page generation. It walks through a four-step workflow that replaces traditional design software with AI-generated, branded, production-ready assets. The relevance is the shift of design work toward prompt-driven generation, touching design systems, code generation, and prompt engineering.
